title: Privacy Policy
intro: This privacy policy describes how GRAND DOM processes and protects the personal data of users who interact with our website.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.body: The controller of your personal data is GRAND DOM, based in Warsaw, Poland. Contact: granddom7@op.pl, tel. +48 886 193 598.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.body: Through our contact form we collect: full name, email address, phone number (optional), and the content of your message including your property preferences. Providing this data is voluntary.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Processing
sections.body: We process your data solely to respond to your enquiry, provide real-estate brokerage services and, with your consent, to send tailored property offers. The legal basis is Article 6(1)(a), (b) and (f) of the GDPR.

sections.heading: 4. Retention Period
sections.body: We keep your data no longer than necessary for the purpose for which it was collected — typically up to 24 months after the last contact, unless applicable law requires a longer retention period (e.g. accounting records).

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict and port your data, as well as to object and lodge a complaint with the President of the Polish Personal Data Protection Office. To exercise these rights, contact granddom7@op.pl.

sections.heading: 6. Cookies and analytics tools
sections.body: Our site uses cookies that are strictly necessary for its operation. Once you give consent via the cookie banner, we load Google Tag Manager (Google Ireland Limited), which may set additional analytics and marketing cookies (e.g. Google Analytics, Google Ads). The data collected is anonymous information about how you use the site — pages viewed, session duration, device and approximate location. We do not use this data for automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects concerning you. You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing your browser data — the banner will reappear.

sections.heading: 7. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We may entrust it to trusted service providers (e.g. contact form provider, hosting, accounting) under data-processing agreements compliant with the GDPR.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: For any data protection matters, please contact us at granddom7@op.pl or +48 886 193 598.
